formulas.description: Revenue - Cost of revenue = Gross profit
formulas.operation: Revenue - Cost of revenue = Gross profit

formulas.description: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative = Total operating expenses
formulas.left_side: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative = Total operating expenses

formulas.description: Gross profit - Total operating expenses = Operating income
formulas.operation: Gross profit - Total operating expenses = Operating income

formulas.description: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net = Total other income (expense), net
formulas.left_side: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net = Total other income (expense), net

formulas.description: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net = Income before income tax
formulas.left_side: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net = Income before income tax

formulas.description: Income before income tax - Income tax expense = Net income
formulas.left_side: Income before income tax - Income tax expense
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense = Net income

Appears on the Condensed Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income as net cash flow hedge OCI.
Appears on the Condensed Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income as total OCI.
Appears on the Condensed Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income as Total comprehensive income, not on income statement.
Disclosed in the Income Taxes note (Note 4), not shown as a line item on the face of the income statement.
Appears in the EPS note (Note 3) as 'Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards', not on the face of the income statement.
Appears in the EPS note (Note 3) as anti-dilutive awards excluded, not on the face of the income statement.

formulas.description: Sum of current assets equals Total current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets = Total current assets

formulas.description: Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets = Total assets

formulas.description: Sum of current liabilities equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities = Total current liabilities

formulas.description: Total current liabilities plus noncurrent liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities = Total liabilities

formulas.description: Sum of equity components equals Total shareholders' equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings = Total shareholders' equity

formulas.description: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders' equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders' equity
formulas.operation: Total liabilities + Total shareholders' equity = Total liabilities and shareholders' equity

formulas.description: Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders' equity
formulas.operation: Total assets = Total liabilities and shareholders' equity

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Appears on the balance sheet as a placeholder line 'Commitments and contingencies - see Note 11' with nil value; tagged with ix:nonFraction xsi:nil='true'. It has no monetary value but is tagged as a balance sheet placeholder.
Disclosed in Note 8 (Balance Sheet Components) as a sub-component of Inventories; not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.
Disclosed in Note 8 as a sub-component of Inventories; not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.
Disclosed in Note 8 as a sub-component of Inventories; not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.
Disclosed in Note 8 as a sub-component of Other long-term liabilities (Deferred income tax); not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.
Disclosed in Note 8 as Income tax payable within Other long-term liabilities; not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.
Disclosed in Note 8 as Deferred revenue sub-component of Accrued and other current liabilities; not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.
Disclosed in Note 8 as Deferred revenue within Other long-term liabilities; not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.

Disclosed in Note 8 as Operating leases sub-component within Accrued and other current liabilities; not separately presented on face of balance sheet. Extensible list tag maps this to AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent.
Disclosed in Note 8 as Non-marketable equity securities within Other Assets (Long Term); embedded within the Other assets balance sheet line.
Tagged in Note 10 (Debt) as net long-term carrying amount; the balance sheet line uses us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent. Both represent the same value but come from the debt note table.
Present value of total operating lease liability from Note 14 (Leases); sum of current and noncurrent operating lease liabilities. Not separately presented on the face of the balance sheet.

formulas.description: CFO components sum to Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes + Other + Accounts receivable + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities = Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.description: CFI components sum to Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired = Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.description: CFF components sum to Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets = Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.description: CFO + CFI + CFF = Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities = Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents = Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Supplemental cash flow information disclosed in Note 14 (Leases) - 'Operating cash flow used for operating leases'; not a separate line item on the face of the cash flow statement.
Supplemental non-cash information disclosed in Note 14 (Leases) - 'Operating lease assets obtained in exchange for lease obligations'; not on the face of the cash flow statement.
Supplemental non-cash investing activity disclosed in Note 8 - 'Property, equipment and intangible assets acquired by assuming related liabilities'; not on the face of the cash flow statement.

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Apr 27, 2025)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 26, 2025)
Retained earnings change on BS approximates Net income - Dividends (FY2026 Q1)
